SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-01-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-01-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL.APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY LUCKY STEWART--MERIDIAN MANAGEMENT GROUP. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
